query: Show me pairs or clusters of audiences that have identical rule definitions.

trace.sql: SELECT a.SEGMENTID AS audience_id_1, a.NAME AS audience_name_1, b.SEGMENTID AS audience_id_2, b.NAME AS audience_name_2, a.DEFINITION AS rule_definition FROM dim_segment a JOIN dim_segment b ON a.DEFINITION = b.DEFINITION AND a.SEGMENTID < b.SEGMENTID
warnings: Skipped hkg_br_property_property.parquet: Invalid Input Error: Failed to read Parquet file 'DBSnapshot/hkg_br_property_property.parquet': Need at least one non-root column in the file

answer:
There is one pair of audiences with identical rule definitions: 

1. **Person: Birthday Today 001** (ID: `2fdfefe1-04d0-46ce-9fbd-7611e311dd26`)
2. **Person: Birthday today** (ID: `f2a200b1-5d0a-4c9b-9202-4d34326cd9df`)

Both audiences share the following rule definition which checks if the person's birth date (day and month) matches today's date:

`{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"and","params":[{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"=","params":[{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"getDayOfMonth","params":[{"nodeType":"fieldLookup","fieldName":"birthDate","object":{"nodeType":"fieldLookup","fieldName":"person","object":{"nodeType":"parameterReference","position":1}}}]},{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"getDayOfMonth","params":[{"nodeType":"literal","literalType":"Timestamp","value":"today"}]}]},{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"=","params":[{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"getMonth","params":[{"nodeType":"fieldLookup","fieldName":"birthDate","object":{"nodeType":"fieldLookup","fieldName":"person","object":{"nodeType":"parameterReference","position":1}}}]},{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"getMonth","params":[{"nodeType":"literal","literalType":"Timestamp","value":"today"}]}]}]}`

There is one pair of audiences with identical rule definitions: 

1. **Person: Birthday Today 001** (ID: `2fdfefe1-04d0-46ce-9fbd-7611e311dd26`)
2. **Person: Birthday today** (ID: `f2a200b1-5d0a-4c9b-9202-4d34326cd9df`)

Both audiences share the following rule definition which checks if the person's birth date (day and month) matches today's date:

`{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"and","params":[{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"=","params":[{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"getDayOfMonth","params":[{"nodeType":"fieldLookup","fieldName":"birthDate","object":{"nodeType":"fieldLookup","fieldName":"person","object":{"nodeType":"parameterReference","position":1}}}]},{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"getDayOfMonth","params":[{"nodeType":"literal","literalType":"Timestamp","value":"today"}]}]},{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"=","params":[{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"getMonth","params":[{"nodeType":"fieldLookup","fieldName":"birthDate","object":{"nodeType":"fieldLookup","fieldName":"person","object":{"nodeType":"parameterReference","position":1}}}]},{"nodeType":"fnApply","fnName":"getMonth","params":[{"nodeType":"literal","literalType":"Timestamp","value":"today"}]}]}]}`
